vocabulary.title: Literal Club GraphQL API Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Controlled vocabulary and term definitions for the Literal Club GraphQL API, covering books, reading states, shelves, reviews, highlights, clubs, and user profiles.

terms.label: Book
terms.definition: A published work tracked on Literal Club. Contains bibliographic metadata including title, subtitle, description, cover image, ISBN-10, ISBN-13, language, page count, published date, publisher, physical format, and associated authors.

terms.label: User Profile
terms.definition: A Literal Club user account with public identity information. Profiles are identified by a unique handle and contain display name, bio, profile image, and social graph counts.

terms.label: Reading State
terms.definition: Records a user's current relationship with a book. Possible status values are WANTS_TO_READ, IS_READING, FINISHED, DROPPED, and NONE.

terms.label: Reading Progress
terms.definition: Tracks incremental progress through a book for a user currently in the IS_READING state. Progress can be expressed as a page number or percentage.

terms.label: Book Review
terms.definition: A user's written assessment of a book. Reviews include an optional star rating on a 0.0–5.0 scale, free-text content, a spoiler flag, and categorization tags.

terms.label: Highlight / Moment
terms.definition: A captured passage or thought associated with a specific point in a book, sometimes called a highlight. Contains a quote from the text, an optional personal note, a location reference (where), and a spoiler flag.

terms.label: Shelf
terms.definition: A user-curated list of books organized around a theme or topic. Shelves are identified by a slug and can be public or private. Books can be added to or removed from shelves.

terms.label: Reading Club
terms.definition: A community space on Literal Club where members gather to read and discuss books together. Clubs are identified by a handle and can be featured on the platform.

terms.label: Reading Goal
terms.definition: A personal reading target set by a user, typically specifying a number of books to read within a time period such as a year.

terms.label: Author
terms.definition: A person who has written one or more books tracked on Literal Club. Authors are identified by a slug and can be used to discover all books associated with them.

terms.label: Book Edition
terms.definition: A specific physical or digital release of a book, potentially differing in language, publisher, page count, or ISBN from other editions of the same work.

terms.label: Login Mutation
terms.definition: GraphQL mutation that authenticates a user with email and password credentials and returns a JWT bearer token used to authorize subsequent API calls.

terms.label: Register Mutation
terms.definition: GraphQL mutation that creates a new Literal Club user account. Requires email, password, display name, unique handle, and at least one preferred reading language.

terms.label: Book Search
terms.definition: GraphQL query that searches for books by title or author name and returns a list of matching Book objects.

terms.label: My Books Query
terms.definition: Authenticated GraphQL query returning all books associated with the current user's reading states across all statuses.

terms.label: My Books by Reading State
terms.definition: Authenticated GraphQL query returning books filtered to a specific reading status (WANTS_TO_READ, IS_READING, FINISHED, DROPPED).

terms.label: Update Reading State Mutation
terms.definition: Authenticated GraphQL mutation that sets or changes a user's reading status for a specific book.

terms.label: Activity Feed
terms.definition: Authenticated GraphQL query that returns a social activity feed showing reading updates, reviews, and highlights from profiles the current user follows.

terms.label: JWT Bearer Token
terms.definition: JSON Web Token returned by the login mutation and used as a Bearer token in the Authorization HTTP header to authenticate write operations and access personal data through the Literal Club GraphQL API.
